creator: nakaji@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
Samba Japanese Edition is updated to 2.2, which includes
many bug fix of samba-2.0.7 itself and samba-2.0.7-ja-2.1
and improvements of Japanese characters handling.

Fix: 

Patch from ports-current is available at
http://www.rc.tutrp.tut.ac.jp/~nakaji/tmp/ja-samba.diff.gz
or
http://www.heimat.gr.jp/~nakaji/FreeBSD/ports/ja-samba.diff.gz
